title: eurya reflexa
intro: Eurya reflexa, also known as the reflex eurya or tree of the gods, is a type of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Eurya reflexa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and aid in weight loss. Eurya reflexa can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
